png

Class PngChunkIHDR

  • java.lang.Object
    • png.PngChunk
      • png.PngChunkIHDR

  • public class PngChunkIHDR
extends PngChunk
    Represents an IHDR (Image Header) chunk in a PNG file, which stores critical image header information.

    This chunk must be the first segment in any valid PNG stream. It contains the image dimensions, bit depth, colour type, compression method, filter method, and interlace method required to decode the image data.

    Since:
    07 July 2026
    Version:
    1.0
    Author:
    Trevor Maggs

      Returns the raw filter method value.

      Returns the image height in pixels.

    • Constructor Detail

      • PngChunkIHDR

        public PngChunkIHDR(long length,
                    byte[] typeBytes,
                    int crc32,
                    byte[] data,
                    long offsetStart)
        Constructs a PngChunkIHDR instance with the specified metadata.

        According to the PNG specification, the IHDR chunk payload must contain exactly 13 bytes:

        • Width: 4-byte unsigned integer
        • Height: 4-byte unsigned integer
        • Bit depth: 1 byte
        • Color type: 1 byte
        • Compression method: 1 byte
        • Filter method: 1 byte
        • Interlace method: 1 byte
        Parameters:
        length - the length of the chunk's data field (must be exactly 13)
        typeBytes - the raw 4-byte chunk type
        crc32 - the CRC value read from the file
        data - the raw IHDR payload
        offsetStart - the absolute physical position in the file where the chunk begins

    • Method Detail

        Returns the image width in pixels.

      • printProperties

        public void printProperties(PropertyDisplay display)
        Prints the structural image header fields of this chunk to the specified display target.

        Integration Note: This method is intended primarily for use by PhotoshopManager, which invokes it to collect and format chunk properties for display and reporting.

        Overrides:
        printProperties in class PngChunk
        Parameters:
        display - the target that receives the formatted metadata properties

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        Returns a string representation of the chunk's properties and structural metadata.
        Overrides:
        toString in class PngChunk
        Returns:
        a formatted string describing this chunk
